name: Quickie Quiches
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup roasted sweet red peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions: Prepare pastry for a single crust pie as directed. On a floured surface, roll the pastry to 1/8 inch thickness. For 2 - 1/2 inch quiches, cut twelve 4-inch circles; for 1 - 3/4 inch quiches, cut 24 3-inch circles. Line muffin cups with the appropriate circle sizes; set aside. In a bowl, combine eggs, milk, light cream, oregano, white pepper, sage, and garlic powder. Sprinkle cheese and red peppers into pastry-lined cups. Pour egg mixture into each cup. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 15 minutes for 1 - 3/4 inch quiches, or about 20 minutes for 2 - 1/2 inch quiches, until the filling appears set. Cool in muffin cups for 10 minutes; remove from cups. Serve warm. Or wrap in foil and freeze. Reheat, covered with foil on a baking sheet in a 325°F oven for about 25 minutes. Make 12 (2 - 1/2 inch) or 24 (1 - 3/4 inch) quiches.
